full_text:
Chen Shi (Zhonggong) 陳寔 (仲弓)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Shi (陳寔), styledZhonggong (仲弓). A government official who was well-liked by many. Admired throughout the Empire. Chen Shi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Chen Shi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
